overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking down the central aisle of a dimly lit stone cathedral toward a large wooden door, with atmospheric candlelight and stained glass windows creating a solemn medieval ambiance.

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily down the central red carpet toward the front of the cathedral

tall stained glass window with colorful illuminated panes on the right wall
dark wooden bench on the left side of the central aisle
dark wooden bench on the right side of the central aisle

tall iron candle stand with lit candles on the right side

massive wooden double door with metal studs at the far end of the cathedral

segments.scene_description: The armored character walks down the central aisle of a dimly lit stone cathedral, passing rows of wooden pews and illuminated candle stands. Stained glass windows cast colored light onto the stone walls while a large wooden door looms at the far end of the nave.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral sanctuary area near the main altar door

events.description: kneeling armored figure comes into view near the front right pew

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door at the front of the cathedral, moving past a kneeling figure

notable_agents.action: kneeling in prayer or contemplation beside the front pew, facing the altar wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the front sanctuary where the large wooden door now dominates the view. A kneeling figure in armor becomes visible to the right, praying near the front pew. The rear stained glass windows and left-side pews fall out of view as the camera approaches the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit stone cathedral that narrows its focus from the expansive nave toward a singular, imposing exit. It begins by trailing an armored character walking down the central aisle, passing rows of wooden pews and candle stands while stained glass windows cast colored light across the stone walls. As the character advances, the perspective shifts toward the front sanctuary, causing the rear windows and side pews to recede from view. The scene then opens to reveal a kneeling armored figure praying to the right before the camera finally closes in on the large wooden door that dominates the frame.
